>manufactured strictly in accordance with OEM standard specifications, it is more convenient to install or remove according to the original factory standard, and can directly replace the old model, The air conditioning compressor can be easily installed in just a few minutes without the assistance of professionals, saving you time and additional costs.

>Our air conditioner compress undergoes comprehensive performance testing and quality inspection prior to shipment to ensure full compliance with OEM specifications. Designed for straightforward, direct-fit replacement, it facilitates a seamless installation process.

>To guarantee proper fitment for your specific vehicle, we strongly recommend verifying compatibility prior to purchase. If you are uncertain about whether this part matches your application, please consult with our customer service team for assistance.

column1: 1,Plug-and-Play Installation: This A/C compressor is a direct replacement for your original part. No modifications or professional help needed - simply unplug the old unit and connect the new one, saving you time and money on mechanic fees.
2, Precision OEM Fit: Engineered to strict OEM specifications, ensuring a perfect fit and seamless performance integration with your vehicle's systems.
3,Reliable Durability: Built with high-quality materials and rigorously tested for long-lasting performance and consistent operation under various driving conditions.

4, Restored Full Functionality: Instantly restores your vehicle's air conditioning performance by replacing the worn-out compressor, ensuring everything works as smoothly as the day you drove it out of the showroom.

Before installation, it is essential to perform a thorough cleaning of the entire air conditioning system. This includes removing residual contaminants from the pipelines and flushing them with a dedicated A/C system cleaning agent. The condenser and evaporator should be soaked for approximately 20 minutes until the cleaning agent discharged from the system runs completely clear. This step is crucial to ensure proper operation and long-term reliability of the new
A/C system installation and servicing require professional knowledge. If you are unfamiliar with the process, it is highly recommended to be performed by a qualified technician.
Ensure you use the correct tools (e.g., wrenches, A/C manifold gauge set) for installation and wear necessary Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) such as gloves and safety glasses.

The A/C system must be thoroughly cleaned before installing a new compressor to prevent premature failure. Only use genuine R134a refrigerant and the specified amount (approx. 500g). Overfilling may cause noise or damage.

Following installation, it is imperative to conduct a thorough inspection of all electrical connections and refrigerant fittings to ensure proper and secure assembly. Only after confirming that all components are correctly and securely installed should you proceed to the next step. At that point, please reconnect the vehicle battery and start the engine. Run the air conditioning system to verify the operational status. A successful installation is confirmed once the system consistently produces cold air as intended. If the air conditioner fails to cool, please do not continue operation and contact a qualified technician.
To ensure compatibility, please verify this part fits your specific vehicle before purchase. If you are uncertain, we recommend contacting our customer service team for assistance.

column7: >The automotive air conditioning compressor is the heart of the vehicle's air conditioning and refrigeration system, compressing and transporting refrigerant vapor. Its mechanical operation overcomes pipe resistance, ensuring smooth refrigerant flow through the system and delivering continuous cooling

>The automotive air conditioning compressor collects temperature signals from the evaporator outlet. When the temperature reaches a set point, the electromagnetic clutch disengages, stopping the compressor. When the temperature rises, the electromagnetic clutch engages, resuming operation

>The compressor incorporates high-efficiency energy-saving technology that minimizes power consumption, leading to reduced fuel usage and lower carbon emissions. It offers an optimal balance between eco-conscious performance and economic value

>Through structural optimization, it operates with minimal noise and low resistance, effectively decreasing engine load while ensuring a quiet and pleasant cabin environment for a more relaxed driving experience

>From the compressor housing to the internal components, the automotive air conditioning compressor is made of iron, aluminum, copper, and rubber. It offers powerful cooling, oxidation resistance, high temperature resistance, high reliability, and resistance to aging and wear.

column7: >The automotive air conditioning compressor is the heart of the vehicle's air conditioning and refrigeration system, compressing and transporting refrigerant vapor. Its mechanical operation overcomes pipe resistance, ensuring smooth refrigerant flow through the system and delivering continuous cooling

>The automotive air conditioning compressor collects temperature signals from the evaporator outlet. When the temperature reaches a set point, the electromagnetic clutch disengages, stopping the compressor. When the temperature rises, the electromagnetic clutch engages, resuming operation

>The automotive air conditioning compressor is made of durable materials such as aluminum alloy, iron, copper, and rubber. It offers stable performance, high-temperature resistance, and oxidation resistance, providing excellent cooling and heating performance and a comfortable driving experience

>Our automotive air conditioning compressors are manufactured to original manufacturer standards. Each compressor is lubricated before shipment, allowing direct replacement of old or damaged compressors, saving you time and effort

column1: A/C Compressor - 2015-2016 Land Rover Discovery Sport 2.0L I4 VS16 R134A

Brand new A/C compressor designed as a direct OEM replacement for the Land Rover Discovery Sport 2.0L I4 turbo. Delivers OEM quality fitment and reliable air conditioning performance for all trim levels.
Land Rover Discovery Sport S 2.0L I4 Turbo (2015-2016)
Land Rover Discovery Sport SE 2.0L I4 Turbo (2015-2016)
Land Rover Discovery Sport HSE 2.0L I4 Turbo (2015-2016)
Land Rover Discovery Sport HSE Lux/Luxury 2.0L I4 Turbo (2015-2016)
Land Rover Discovery Sport Pure 2.0L I4 Turbo (2016)

Premium OEM replacement A/C compressor for the 2015-2016 Land Rover Discovery Sport featuring the 2.0L I4 turbocharged engine. This factory-specification VS16 compressor includes a 6-groove pulley and complete clutch assembly for direct replacement installation. Covers Discovery Sport S, SE, HSE, HSE Lux, HSE Luxury, and Pure trim levels from both the 2015 and 2016 model years. Pre-filled with PAG46 compressor oil and designed to integrate with the Land Rover climate control system for proper compressor management. Compatible with R134A refrigerant systems. Replaces Land Rover OEM part number LR083480 along with superseded numbers LR051044 and LR066915. No modifications are needed for installation. The bolt-in design connects to the factory wiring harness and refrigerant fittings.
️ Verify vehicle application, engine, and configuration before ordering to ensure proper fitment. Confirm part number compatibility with your vehicle's original equipment.

column1: A/C Compressor - Land Rover LR2 Range Rover Evoque 2012-2015 2.0L I4 Turbo
Brand new A/C compressor designed as a direct OEM replacement for the Land Rover LR2 and Range Rover Evoque 2.0L I4 turbo. Delivers OEM quality fitment and reliable air conditioning performance.
Land Rover LR2 Base/HSE/HSE Lux 2.0L I4 Turbo (2012-2015)

Direct-fit OEM replacement A/C compressor for the 2012-2015 Land Rover LR2 and Range Rover Evoque models powered by the 2.0L I4 turbocharged engine. This compressor assembly includes the integrated clutch for complete plug-and-play installation without splicing or modification to the existing A/C system components. Engineered to deliver consistent cooling output matching the original factory compressor specifications across all operating temperatures. Covers all LR2 trims including Base, HSE, and HSE Lux, plus Range Rover Evoque Dynamic, Prestige, Pure, and Autobiography configurations. Compatible with R134A refrigerant. Replaces Land Rover OEM number LR056302 and superseded numbers LR041119, LR035975, LR027784, and LR030864. The compressor connects to the factory wiring harness and refrigerant fittings for seamless installation.
️ Verify vehicle application, engine, and configuration before ordering to ensure proper fitment. Confirm part number compatibility with your vehicle's original equipment.

column1: A/C Compressor - Land Rover Range Rover L322 HSE Supercharged 4.4L 4.2L V8
Brand new A/C compressor designed as a direct OEM replacement for the Land Rover Range Rover L322 V8 platform. Delivers OEM quality fitment and reliable air conditioning performance.
Land Rover Range Rover HSE 4.4L V8 L322 (2006-2009)
Land Rover Range Rover Supercharged 4.2L V8 L322 (2006-2009)
Land Rover Range Rover Westminster Edition 4.4L V8 L322 (2009)

Direct-fit OEM replacement A/C compressor for the 2006-2009 Land Rover Range Rover L322 platform with the Jaguar AJ-V8 engine in 4.4L naturally aspirated and 4.2L supercharged configurations. This Sanden PXV16 type compressor features a 6-groove pulley and includes the integrated clutch assembly for complete plug-and-play installation. Covers the Range Rover HSE with 4.4L V8, Supercharged with 4.2L V8, and Westminster Edition with 4.4L V8 for all model years from 2006 through 2009. Engineered to deliver consistent cooling output matching the original factory compressor specifications. Compatible with R134A refrigerant. Replaces Land Rover OEM number JPB500211 and superseded part number JPB500210. Connects to factory wiring harness and refrigerant fittings for seamless installation.
️ Verify vehicle application, engine, and configuration before ordering to ensure proper fitment. Confirm part number compatibility with your vehicle's original equipment.

column7: >By compressing and circulating the refrigerant, it absorbs the heat in the carriage and discharges it to the outside of the car, thus achieving cooling and providing a cool and comfortable environment for passengers in hot weather.

>Driving in high temperature environment can easily lead to driver fatigue, irritability and inattention. An efficient refrigeration air conditioner can significantly improve the driver's comfort and keep a clear head, thus greatly improving driving safety.

column9: >Improve the air quality inside the car

column7: >When air conditioning is used for refrigeration, the air inside the car will circulate through the evaporator, which can filter out particulate pollutants such as dust and pollen to a certain extent and provide cleaner air for passengers.

column9: >Dehumidification and fog prevention, ensuring clear vision

column7: >the compressor will remove moisture from the air while refrigerating. This is particularly important in wet weather or rainy days, which can effectively prevent fogging inside the window and ensure that the driver has a clear vision, which is another key safety advantage.
